status_summary: Red because schedule risk, budget risk are driving the highest weighted pressure.
reasons: Progress trails plan by 13 points and the project is 22 days behind schedule.
The project has consumed 92% of budget while delivering 32% completion.
The project has 1 critical blockers and 3 unresolved issues.
recommendations: Re-baseline overdue work and assign owners for the next two milestone dates.
Freeze non-essential spend until delivery progress catches up with the burn rate.
Run a daily blocker and issue review until the open execution queue drops materially.
assumptions: Used the workbook's project summary row as the primary source of truth for current-state metrics.
Did not use the provided RAG column as an input; treated it only as an optional validation reference.
